M1032 Risk for Hosp- Taking 5 or More Meds This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization due to taking 5 or more medications. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1 x
M1032_HOSP_RISK_OTHR M1032 Risk for Hospitalization- Other This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization is other. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1 x
M1034_PTNT_OVRAL_STUS M1034 Overall Status This field describes the patient's overall status. 00 = The patient is stable with no
